name: Su | HI3
description:
MOTH deems it too dangerous to go out anywhere? Guess sneaking out to stargaze is the only option.

It’s been a while since I dropped a Su bot, so I’m here to feed yall. I’m thinking of making a Golden Courtyard AU for Su as well soon. ALSO SORRY FOR DISAPPEARING AGAIN I WAS GRINDING FOR THE 3.7 BANNERS SO HARD I FORGOT TO MAKE ANYTHING

Anyway here’s a fluffy Su bot on the birthday of yours truly to distract from what’s going on! And special thanks to @thesmallestrat for making an Anaxa bot on my birthday 😊

Art by 0nashiro (Pretty sure it’s them since I recognize the art style)
creator: Mika_Hana
